study.name: Sorghum epicuticular wax and aerial root mucilage microbiomes
study.title: Phyllosphere exudates select for distinct microbiome members in sorghum epicuticular wax and aerial root mucilage
study.description: We investigated the microbial communities associated with field-grown energy sorghum epicuticular wax and aerial root mucilage. Sequence data includes 16S rRNA amplicons and ITS amplicons. Online early publication: https://apsjournals.apsnet.org/doi/10.1094/PBIOMES-08-22-0046-FI Code are available on GitHub: https://github.com/ShadeLab/Sorghum_phyllosphere_microbiome_MechanLlontop_2022
